metadata.name: Schedule Recurring User Jobs
metadata.description: Schedule and inspect recurring jobs by setting up Cron jobs as a regular user
objectives: Schedule recurring jobs to run as a nonprivileged user
Inspect the commands that a scheduled recurring job runs

tasks.name: Verify my_first_cron_job.txt exists
tasks.description: The cron job should have created /home/student/my_first_cron_job.txt
tasks.failure_message: my_first_cron_job.txt file not found - cron job may not have run yet
hints: Create a cron job that runs every 2 minutes: crontab -e
Wait up to 2 minutes for the job to run

tasks.name: Verify my_first_cron_job.txt contains date output
tasks.description: The file should contain date output from the cron job
tasks.success_message: my_first_cron_job.txt contains output from the date command
hints: The cron job should append date output to the file
Verify the cron job schedule matches current day of week

tasks.name: Verify student crontab is removed
tasks.description: All scheduled recurring jobs for the student user should be removed
tasks.failure_message: Student crontab still exists - use crontab -r to remove
